description: Existing Vue 3 app, user minta tambah page transition motion antar route. UI + interaction only, tidak ubah data layer.
user_message: Add page transition animations between routes in our Vue 3 SPA at apps/web. Use whatever motion library best fits, or native View Transitions API if browser support allows. The transition should signal hierarchy of navigation: forward push, backward pop, lateral switch. Ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected.
notes: Smaller UI ask than task-04. Tests whether rules pack stays focused (no over-loading) on a simple UI change. prefers-reduced-motion is accessibility floor.
